title: phyllanthus nutans subsp. nutans
intro: Phyllanthus nutans subsp. nutans, also known as the drooping airplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nutans subsp. nutans include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to improve liver function and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
